title: ADC news RSS feed launched
author: Mealman1551
content: ADC has a new RSS feed for simple news updates.

title: ADC 1.5.0 Release Candidate binaries available
author: Mealman1551
content:
The ADC 1.5.0 Release Candidate (RC) binaries are now available for testing. Check this page for the latest RC builds and provide feedback and open issues on Codeberg.
https://codeberg.org/Mealman1551/adc_1.5.0_rc_bin/releases

title: Repository improvements
author: Mealman1551
content: New issue templates, release asset packaging, and clearer contributor documentation have been added.

title: Open source contributions welcome
author: Mealman1551
content: All contributions are welcome through GitHub. Submit issues, patches, or documentation improvements to help ADC grow.

title: ADC 1.4.5 LTS released
author: Mealman1551
content: Improved stability and security updates are now available for Windows and Linux users with the latest LTS release.
